title: Costly fuel pushes more Indians to buy electric cars but challenges remain
summary: Rising fuel costs in India are driving consumers toward electric vehicles in the world's third-largest auto market, though adoption still faces obstacles. The price sensitivity is accelerating EV market penetration despite infrastructure and affordability challenges.
content: High fuel prices are strengthening the case for EV adoption in the world's third largest auto market.

zh.title: 昂贵的燃油促使更多印度人购买电动汽车，但挑战仍存
zh.summary: 印度燃油成本上升正推动消费者转向购买电动车，该国是全球第三大汽车市场但采用仍面临障碍。价格敏感性正在加快电动车市场渗透率，尽管基础设施和经济承受力仍是挑战。

title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire
summary: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to implement a ceasefire following diplomatic negotiations in Washington facilitated by the United States. The agreement was announced jointly through a State Department statement on Wednesday. The development marks a significant diplomatic breakthrough in regional tensions.
content: Lebanon and Israel have ​agreed to ​the implementation ​of a ceasefire, according to a joint statement with the United States ⁠released ‌by the State Department ⁠on Wednesday following negotiations in Washington.

zh.title: 以色列和黎巴嫩同意实施停火
zh.summary: 以色列和黎巴嫩在美国促进的华盛顿外交谈判后同意实施停火。该协议在周三通过国务院声明联合宣布。这一进展标志着地区紧张局势中的重大外交突破。

title: SpaceX says it’s worth $1.75tn as it nears stock market debut
summary: SpaceX announced a valuation of $1.75 trillion as it prepares for a stock market debut, with the company setting an early target price for potential investors. The valuation underscores SpaceX's position as one of the most valuable private companies globally. The anticipated IPO reflects growing investor appetite for space exploration and commercial spaceflight opportunities.
content: Elon Musk’s space exploration company set a target price for buyers earlier than expected.

zh.title: SpaceX表示在接近股市首次公开募股时其估值为1.75万亿美元
zh.summary: SpaceX宣布了1.75万亿美元的估值，因为它准备进行股市首次公开募股，该公司为潜在投资者设定了早期目标价格。该估值强调了SpaceX作为全球最有价值的私人公司之一的地位。预期的首次公开募股反映了投资者对太空探索和商业航天飞行机会日益增长的需求。

title: Broadcom stock plunges on weak software sales, unchanged AI chip forecast for the year
summary: Broadcom's stock fell sharply following weaker-than-expected software sales and an unchanged full-year AI chip forecast despite reporting second-quarter results. The company missed revenue estimates, disappointing investor expectations for growth acceleration. The results suggest caution in the demand environment even as AI adoption accelerates.
content: Broadcom reported fiscal second-quarter results on Wednesday and missed estimates for revenue.

zh.title: 博通股价因软件销售疲弱而暴跌，AI芯片全年预测不变
zh.summary: 博通股价因软件销售低于预期和全年AI芯片预测不变而大幅下跌，尽管公布了第二季度财报。该公司未能达到收入预期，令投资者对增长加速的期望落空。这些结果表明，尽管AI应用加速，但需求环境仍需谨慎。

title: 'It is by the grace of God that you find a diamond'
summary: The growing market for lab-grown diamonds is increasing pressure on natural diamond miners and sellers as consumers embrace synthetic alternatives. Lab-grown diamonds offer cost savings and ethical advantages, shifting consumer preferences away from mined gems. The trend threatens the traditional diamond industry's market share and pricing power.
content: The rising popularity of lab-grown diamonds heaps pressure on those hunting for the natural gems.

zh.title: "找到钻石靠上帝的恩典"
zh.summary: 随着消费者拥抱合成钻石替代品，实验室培养钻石市场的增长给天然钻石矿工和卖家带来压力。实验室培养钻石提供成本节省和伦理优势，改变消费者对开采宝石的偏好。这一趋势威胁到传统钻石行业的市场份额和定价权。

title: Elon Musk's net worth poised to sail past $1 trillion in SpaceX IPO
summary: Based on SpaceX's IPO prospectus, Elon Musk's stake is valued at over $866 billion, positioning him to reach trillionaire status if the company goes public at expected valuations. The potential IPO would represent a significant wealth milestone driven by SpaceX's market valuation.
content: Based on SpaceX's updated IPO prospectus, Elon Musk owns shares in the company worth over $866 billion.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克的净资产有望在SpaceX IPO后超过1万亿美元
zh.summary: 根据SpaceX的IPO招股说明书，埃隆·马斯克的股份价值超过8660亿美元，如果公司按预期估值上市，他将成为万亿富翁。潜在的IPO将代表由SpaceX市场估值驱动的重大财富里程碑。

title: Jim Cramer warns excess supply could be the next biggest threat to the bull market
summary: Jim Cramer cautioned that escalating AI-related capital raises could outpace investor demand and create a significant headwind for the stock market. The warning highlights concerns about valuation sustainability amid a flood of AI-focused funding rounds. Excess supply of investment opportunities could pressure equity valuations and market momentum.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer warned that a growing wave of AI-related capital raises could overwhelm investor demand and create a near-term headwind for stocks.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默警告供过于求可能成为牛市最大的下一个威胁
zh.summary: 吉姆·克莱默警告说，不断升级的AI相关融资可能超过投资者需求，并对股市造成重大阻力。这一警告凸显了在AI融资浪潮下对估值可持续性的担忧。投资机会供过于求可能会对股票估值和市场势头造成压力。

title: How single-stock turbulence presents ‘asymmetric’ downside risk for a rather calm S&P 500
summary: Individual stocks are experiencing heightened volatility while broader S&P 500 index volatility remains subdued, creating what analysts call a "dispersion trade" with asymmetric downside risks. The divergence between single-stock and index-level volatility patterns suggests underlying market fragility despite calm index indicators. This dynamic may signal increased vulnerability to a broader selloff as concentrated risks accumulate in individual securities.
content: A “dispersion trade” is being fueled by rising volatility for individual stocks while index volatility is falling — suggesting the risks of a selloff are rising

zh.title: 单只股票波动如何为平静的标普500指数带来"不对称"下行风险
zh.summary: 个别股票经历波动性升高，而更广泛的标普500指数波动性保持温和，形成分析师所称的"分散交易"，存在不对称下行风险。单只股票和指数级波动性模式的差异表明市场存在潜在脆弱性。这种动态可能预示着随着集中风险在个别证券中积累，市场更容易面临更广泛的抛售。

title: The Fed can’t protect consumers from supply shocks and price gouging — but Congress can
summary: Global disruptions are driving up prices for essentials like groceries and gasoline, with the argument that the Federal Reserve lacks tools to address supply-side inflation but Congress can. The opinion piece calls for legislative action to tackle price pressures beyond monetary policy solutions. The debate highlights the limits of central bank policy in controlling inflationary pressures from supply constraints.
content: As global disruptions drive up Americans’ grocery and gasoline prices, lawmakers need to take a stand.

zh.title: 美联储无法保护消费者免受供应冲击和价格欺诈——但国会可以
zh.summary: 全球中断导致食品杂货和汽油等必需品价格上升，观点认为美联储缺乏应对供应端通胀的工具，但国会可以。这篇观点文章呼吁采取立法行动来解决超出货币政策解决方案范畴的价格压力。这场辩论凸显了中央银行政策在控制供应约束导致的通胀压力方面的局限性。

title: I am 71. Would it be foolish to sell $10,000 in stock to visit my grandchildren in Thailand?
summary: A 71-year-old reader asks whether selling $10,000 in stock to fund a family visit to Thailand would be financially unwise, noting adequate income from Social Security and pensions. The question explores the balance between preserving wealth and enjoying retirement experiences.
content: “I am comfortable living on my Social Security and pension income.”

zh.title: 我71岁了。为了去泰国看孙子孙女而卖掉1万美元的股票会很愚蠢吗？
zh.summary: 一位71岁的读者询问，是否卖掉1万美元的股票来资助前往泰国的家庭旅行在财务上是不明智的，指出他有来自社会保障和养老金的充足收入。这个问题探讨了保护财富和享受退休生活体验之间的平衡。

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman meets with lawmakers, Trump officials in DC
summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman met with lawmakers and Trump administration officials in Washington following the president's new executive order on artificial intelligence. Altman expressed support for Trump's AI policy directive, signaling alignment between OpenAI's interests and the administration's approach. The meeting reflects ongoing efforts by AI leaders to shape regulatory frameworks governing the technology industry.
content: President Donald Trump signed an executive order about AI this week, which Altman voiced support for.

zh.title: OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼在华盛顿与立法者和特朗普官员会面
zh.summary: 在总统发布新的人工智能行政令之后，OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥特曼在华盛顿与立法者和特朗普政府官员会面。奥特曼表示支持特朗普的人工智能政策指令，表明OpenAI的利益与政府方案保持一致。这次会议反映了人工智能领袖为塑造科技产业监管框架所做的持续努力。

title: You’re going to pay tax on RMDs — there’s no way around it. Or is there?
summary: A retirement planning guide explores strategies for managing taxes on Required Minimum Distributions (RMDs) from retirement accounts. The article provides actionable approaches to minimize tax liability on RMD withdrawals.
content: Here’s your new playbook to protect your retirement cash.

zh.title: 你必须为RMDs缴税——无法避免。或者真的可以吗？
zh.summary: 一份退休规划指南探讨了管理退休账户强制最低分配(RMD)税款的策略。该文章提供了切实可行的方法来最小化RMD提款的税收负债。

title: SpaceX officially set to crush global records in targeting massive IPO haul of up to $86 billion
summary: SpaceX is targeting a massive IPO that could raise up to $86 billion, with Elon Musk maintaining control of over 80% of voting power. The offering would set records for IPO size while preserving Musk's operational control of the company.
content: Elon Musk will hold more than 80% of the voting power of SpaceX shares, cementing his control over the company.

zh.title: SpaceX官宣瞄准860亿美元IPO，创造全球纪录
zh.summary: SpaceX瞄准募集高达860亿美元的巨额IPO，埃隆·马斯克将保持80%以上的投票权。此次IPO将创造融资规模纪录，同时保护马斯克对公司的运营控制权。

title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Markets faced headwinds as the S&P 500 ended its nine-day winning streak amid rising Treasury yields and oil prices. The article previews key factors expected to influence trading in the following session.
content: The S&P 500 snapped a nine-day winning streak on Wednesday as rising Treasury yields and oil prices kept stocks under pressure.

zh.title: 周四股市热点：下一个交易日的市场推动因素
zh.summary: 受美国国债收益率和油价上升影响，标普500指数结束九天涨势。文章预览了可能影响下一交易日走势的关键因素。

title: SpaceX targets $135 IPO price at valuation of $1.77 trillion
summary: SpaceX is targeting a $135 per share IPO price, valuing the company at $1.77 trillion, which would make it the seventh-largest U.S. company by market cap, surpassing Tesla. This valuation reflects SpaceX's position as a leading space technology and satellite communications company.
content: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh-biggest in the U.S., above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

zh.title: SpaceX瞄准135美元IPO价格，估值1.77万亿美元
zh.summary: SpaceX瞄准每股135美元的IPO价格，估值达1.77万亿美元，将成为美国第七大上市公司，超越特斯拉。这一估值反映了SpaceX在航天技术和卫星通信领域的领先地位。

title: Bitcoin's high conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows
summary: High conviction Bitcoin holders are turning into sellers amid price declines, with approximately $2.4 billion sold in the past two days. This significant shift in behavior from major holders could signal weakening confidence in the cryptocurrency's near-term prospects.
content: In the past two days, bitcoin's highest conviction holders have sold about $2.4 billion in bitcoin.

zh.title: 比特币高信念持有者在加密货币价格跌至新低时转变为卖家
zh.summary: 高信念比特币持有者在价格下跌中转变为卖家,过去两天售出约24亿美元。主要持有者行为的这一重大转变可能预示着对加密货币近期前景信心的减弱。

title: Broadcom earnings could breathe new life into the chip rally
summary: Broadcom's upcoming earnings report is drawing analyst attention, particularly regarding demand for custom artificial intelligence chips. Strong results could reinvigorate momentum in the broader chip sector rally.
content: Analysts are eyeing custom artificial intelligence chip demand.

zh.title: 博通财报可能为芯片涨势注入新生命
zh.summary: 博通即将发布的财报正吸引分析师关注,尤其是关于定制人工智能芯片的需求。强劲的业绩可能会重新激发更广泛的芯片板块涨势势头。

title: Best jumbo CD rates for June 2026: Earn up to 4.10% APY
summary: Jumbo certificate of deposit accounts are currently offering above-average rates, with some reaching 4.10% APY for large deposits. This represents a competitive savings opportunity for investors with substantial funds to deploy.
content: Have a big deposit to put into savings? These top jumbo CDs offer above-average rates.

zh.title: 2026年6月最佳大额定期存单利率:年收益率高达4.10%
zh.summary: 大额定期存单账户目前提供高于平均水平的利率,某些账户对大额存款的年收益率可达4.10%。这为拥有大量资金的投资者提供了一个有竞争力的储蓄机会。

title: Social Security benefit cuts could average $500 a month for retirees if trust fund runs dry, report finds
summary: A new report warns that Social Security benefit cuts could average $500 monthly for retirees if the program's retirement trust fund becomes depleted. This highlights the urgent fiscal challenges facing the system as it approaches its depletion date.
content: Social Security faces a looming depletion date for its retirement trust fund. A new report looks at how much benefit cuts Americans may see to their benefits.

zh.title: 社会安全福利若信托基金耗尽可能平均每月削减500美元,报告发现
zh.summary: 一份新报告警告称,如果该计划的退休信托基金耗尽,社会安全福利削减可能平均每月给退休人员减少500美元。这突出了该系统面临的紧迫财政挑战,因为该系统接近其耗尽日期。

title: Only 5% of day traders make money, but the SEC is now making it easier for more people to try it anyway
summary: Despite only 5% of day traders achieving profitability, the SEC is eliminating the pattern day-trading rule starting June 4, making it easier for retail investors to attempt day trading. The rule change raises concerns about retail investor risks.
content: The pattern day-trading rule is going away on June 4, but retail investors should understand the risks.

zh.title: 仅有5%的日交易员赚钱,但美国证券交易委员会现在使更多人更容易尝试
zh.summary: 尽管只有5%的日间交易员实现了盈利,但美国证券交易委员会自6月4日起消除了模式日交易规则,使散户投资者更容易尝试日间交易。这一规则变化引发了对散户投资者风险的担忧。

title: High gas prices are limiting how far singles will go for love — literally
summary: Rising gas prices are influencing dating behavior, with singles reconsidering how far they're willing to travel for romantic meetings. Higher fuel costs are becoming a practical constraint on dating patterns.
content: “Am I going to drive an hour and a half just for coffee?”

zh.title: 高油价正在限制单身人士为爱情愿意走多远——字面上
zh.summary: 上升的油价正在影响约会行为,单身人士正在重新考虑他们愿意为浪漫见面旅行的距离。较高的燃料成本正在成为约会模式的实际制约因素。

title: Uber slashes people division by nearly a quarter. CEO says 'changes are necessary'
summary: Uber announced layoffs affecting nearly a quarter of its people division, with CEO citing necessary operational changes. The company emphasized the cuts were not AI-driven despite the technology's widespread use in tech workforce reductions.
content: Uber said the cuts were not driven by AI, which has allowed many tech businesses to cut costs and automate workloads.

zh.title: Uber裁员近四分之一 CEO表示"变革是必要的"
zh.summary: Uber宣布裁员影响其人力部门的近四分之一，CEO引用必要的运营变革。公司强调这些裁员不是由AI驱动的，尽管该技术在科技公司裁员中广泛使用。

title: Bessent says he is performing IRS commissioner duties amid Trump tax settlement scrutiny
summary: Treasury Secretary Bessent is performing IRS commissioner duties amid scrutiny over a Trump tax settlement, with Democrats questioning whether other affected taxpayers would receive similar treatment. The situation raises concerns about tax fairness and transparency.
content: Democrats pressed the Treasury chief over whether other taxpayers affected by the leak that included Trump's tax returns would receive similar treatment.

zh.title: Bessent称在特朗普税收协议审查中履行IRS专员职责
zh.summary: 财政部长Bessent在特朗普税收协议审查期间履行IRS专员职责，民主党人质疑其他受影响纳税人是否会获得类似待遇。这一局势引发了对税收公平性和透明度的关注。

title: Historic stock rally faces key test
summary: The ongoing historic stock rally faces a critical test as two major tech companies report earnings after market close. The results could determine the market's next significant directional move.
content: Two key tech companies reporting earnings after the bell could determine the next move higher or lower.

zh.title: 历史性股市上涨面临关键测试
zh.summary: 正在进行的历史性股市上涨面临临界测试，两家主要科技公司在收市后报告收益。这些结果可能决定市场的下一个重要方向。

title: ‘No one seems to wear their bling’: Is it safe to show off your expensive jewelry?
summary: The article examines whether displaying expensive jewelry in public is advisable, considering security and safety risks. The question reflects broader concerns about wealth visibility in contemporary society.
content: “I’ve been to many shows, operas, big parties and fundraisers.”

zh.title: "没有人似乎在展示他们的珠宝"：展示昂贵珠宝是否安全？
zh.summary: 该文章审视了在公共场合展示昂贵珠宝是否可取，考虑了安全和保安风险。这个问题反映了当代社会中关于财富可见性的更广泛关注。

title: Khanna and China committee press Blanche for report on Chinese manufacturing in U.S.
summary: Congressional members are pressing the Justice Department for a delayed report on illegal Chinese manufacturing and labor practices in the U.S. auto industry. The inquiry highlights concerns about foreign labor exploitation in domestic production.
content: The Justice Department report on illegal Chinese labor in the U.S. auto industry was due in May.

zh.title: 卡纳和中国委员会向布兰奇施压要求提交中国在美国制造业的报告
zh.summary: 国会成员正在敦促司法部提交一份迟迟未出的报告，涉及美国汽车工业中的非法中国制造和劳动行为。该调查突显了对国内生产中外国劳动力剥削的担忧。

title: I want to give my brother and his kids $5,000 each. My financial adviser is reluctant. Who’s right?
summary: A person wants to gift $5,000 each to their brother and his children, but their financial adviser is recommending against it, creating a conflict over the decision. The situation is complicated by a history of unrecovered loans to the brother.
content: “In the past I’ve loaned my brother over $12,000, which I’m sure I’ll never get back.”

title: Dow falls 200 points as oil prices and bond yields creep higher: Live updates
summary: The Dow Jones fell Wednesday as rising oil prices and Treasury yields reflected investor concerns about potential inflation from U.S.-Iran conflict escalation.
content: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell on Wednesday as oil prices and Treasury yields moved higher amid worries the U.S.-Iran conflict could keep lifting inflation.

zh.title: 道指下跌200点，油价和债券收益率上升：实时更新

title: Trump says Iran agreed to not have nuclear weapons, but 'they can change their mind'
summary: Trump claims Iran has agreed not to develop nuclear weapons while acknowledging the commitment remains contingent on Iran's future compliance and policy shifts.

title: Trump Accounts create a 'legal backdoor' for Roth IRA wealth, tax attorney says
summary: Tax experts suggest Trump Accounts could function as tax-free retirement vehicles through a previously underutilized legal strategy, potentially offering significant wealth accumulation benefits.
content: There’s a strategy that could help turn these new investment accounts into tax-free vehicles in retirement, some experts say.

zh.title: Trump账户为罗斯个人退休账户财富创造"合法后门"，税务律师称

title: GOP Sen. Tillis slams Trump intelligence pick Pulte: 'Don't think he has a prayer'
summary: Republican Senator Thom Tillis criticized Trump's intelligence directorate nominee Pulte, expressing skepticism about his confirmation prospects despite his demonstrated loyalty.
content: Pulte is widely viewed as a Trump loyalist who has targeted the president's political foes during his tenure leading the housing regulatory agency.

zh.title: 共和党参议员蒂利斯猛烈抨击特朗普情报局提名人普尔特："我认为他没有成功的希望"

title: My late husband had a higher Social Security benefit. We both claimed at 62. Can I get more on his record?
summary: Early claiming of Social Security benefits at 62 can reduce survivor benefits for spouses, though options may exist depending on individual circumstances and filing history.
content: Early benefit claiming can affect your ultimate payment amount, though not always for survivors.

zh.title: 我已故丈夫的社会保障福利更高。我们都在62岁时申请了。我能从他的记录中获得更多吗？
zh.summary: 在62岁时提前申请社会保障福利会减少配偶的幸存者福利，尽管根据个人情况和申请历史可能存在其他选择。

title: The May jobs report is around the corner. How the market could react, according to JPMorgan
summary: JPMorgan analysts outline potential market reactions to the May jobs report, which will provide crucial data on labor market strength amid inflation and geopolitical uncertainty.
content: A major data report will give investors a glimpse into how the U.S. economy is doing amid the U.S.-Iran war and persistent inflation worries.

zh.title: 五月就业报告即将发布。根据摩根大通，市场可能如何反应

title: KKR, Ares, Blackstone tumble as Partners Group caps private equity fund withdrawals
summary: Major private equity firms declined as Partners Group limited fund withdrawals, renewing investor concerns about redemption pressures and liquidity in private markets.

title: Bitcoin trails stocks by most since 2019 as traders get their kicks elsewhere
summary: Bitcoin has significantly underperformed stocks, marking its coldest relative performance stretch since 2019 as investors redirect capital to equities.
content: Bitcoin hasn't had this cold a winter in seven years.

title: Morgan Stanley will soon open its trillion-dollar wealth management funnel to AI agents
summary: Morgan Stanley is integrating external AI agents into its wealth management platform, positioning itself among the first major U.S. banks to open institutional platforms to AI tools.

title: Europe unveils tech sovereignty package amid growing concerns over reliance on U.S. tech
summary: Europe unveiled a tech sovereignty package including proposals to boost domestic advanced chip manufacturing and cloud computing to reduce reliance on U.S. technology.
content: The proposals include a new act to bolster advanced chip manufacturing and homegrown cloud computing.

zh.title: 欧洲推出技术主权方案以应对美国科技依赖担忧
zh.summary: 欧洲推出了技术主权方案,包括促进国内先进芯片制造和云计算的提案,以减少对美国技术的依赖。

title: Eli Lilly's top dealmaker says don't be surprised to see more M&A that pushes Lilly into new areas
summary: Eli Lilly's chief dealmaker indicates the company plans aggressive acquisitions to expand beyond traditional pharmaceuticals now that it's become the world's most valuable pharma firm.

zh.title: 礼来首席交易官：不要惊讶看到更多将礼来推向新领域的并购交易

title: Investors would be crazy to turn bearish on stocks now, says veteran strategist. In six months, maybe not.
summary: Strategist Marco Papic advises against bearish positioning in stocks currently but warns of potential headwinds in the next six to twelve months due to massive tech IPO concerns.
content: Marco Papic is worried about where stocks are headed in six to 12 months from now, with massive tech IPOs a big part of that concern.

zh.title: 资深策略师称投资者现在看空股票是疯狂的，但六个月后可能不是

title: Private payrolls grew by 122,000 in May, stronger than expected, ADP reports
summary: Private payroll growth exceeded expectations in May with 122,000 new jobs, showing broader-based expansion across sectors rather than concentration in healthcare alone.
content: Unlike prior months, where job growth was concentrated in healthcare and a few other sectors, gains were more broad-based.

zh.title: ADP报告：五月私人薪资增长122,000人，强于预期
zh.summary: 五月私人薪资增长以122,000个新工作超出预期，表明各个行业都实现了更广泛的扩张，而非仅集中在医疗保健领域。

title: Trump tariff plans weigh on European stocks; Dulux owner's shares halted as takeover falls through
summary: European stocks are facing pressure from Trump's tariff plans amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions. The takeover of Dulux paint brand owner collapsed, triggering trading halts on its shares.
content: Investors are also continuing to monitor developments in the U.S.-Iran war after tensions escalated overnight.

zh.title: 特朗普关税计划拖累欧洲股市；杜乐士母公司因收购破裂而停牌

title: Perplexity CEO tells CNBC one metric will determine who wins the AI race
summary: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas argues that whichever company delivers the most value per watt per user will win the AI race. The metric emphasizes energy efficiency as a critical competitive factor.
content: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas said that whichever company can provide the "most taken value per watt per user" will be the AI winners in the future.

zh.title: Perplexity首席执行官告诉CNBC一个指标将决定谁赢得AI竞赛
zh.summary: Perplexity首席执行官阿拉温德·斯里尼瓦斯主张，无论哪家公司能为每用户每瓦特提供最大价值，都将赢得AI竞赛。该指标强调能源效率是关键竞争因素。

title: OECD warns of global slowdown as U.S.-Iran war stymies economic growth prospects
summary: The OECD has downgraded its global growth outlook, warning of lasting economic damage from the Middle East conflict. The geopolitical tensions are materially constraining worldwide economic expansion prospects.
content: The OECD has cut its global growth outlook, warning of lasting damage caused by the Middle East conflict.

zh.title: 经合组织警告美伊战争阻碍经济增长，全球经济放缓
zh.summary: 经合组织已下调全球增长展望，警告中东冲突造成的经济损害持久。地缘政治紧张局势严重制约全球经济扩张前景。

title: U.S. proposes fresh tariffs on 60 economies over forced labor trade practices
summary: The USTR has proposed tariffs ranging from 10% to 12.5% on 60 economies based on their forced labor policies. The move targets countries that haven't adequately addressed forced labor in trade practices.
content: USTR has proposed a 10% duty rate for economies that have adopted a full or partial prohibition on forced labor trade, and 12.5% for all other economies.

zh.title: 美国对60个国家提议新关税以应对强制劳动贸易行为
zh.summary: 美国贸易代表办公室基于强制劳动政策对60个国家提议征收10%至12.5%的关税。此举针对那些未能充分解决贸易实践中强制劳动问题的国家。

title: India's central bank may hike rates to defend its currency
summary: India's central bank may raise interest rates to defend the rupee amid currency depreciation and inflation concerns. The potential move reflects efforts to stabilize the currency and control rising prices.
content: A falling currency and rising risk of higher inflation could prompt India's central bank to hike interest rates.

zh.title: 印度央行可能上调利率以防卫本币

title: DeepSeek slated to draw $7 billion in maiden fundraising, sources say
summary: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek is preparing to raise approximately $7.4 billion in its maiden funding round. The investment signals significant international interest in the emerging AI company.

title: UK Exchange newsletter: English football — in a league of its own?

content: English football appears to be riding high following Arsenal's Premier League win. But scratch beneath the surface and all is not as good as it looks.

title: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
summary: The UK Competition and Markets Authority has enabled publishers to opt out of Google AI search results. The measure aims to strengthen publishers' negotiating positions when licensing content to Google.

title: Bitcoin hits lowest since February as crypto competes for liquidity with blockbuster IPOs
summary: Bitcoin has fallen to its lowest level since February as capital flows toward record stock market highs and major IPOs. The decline reflects investors reallocating funds from cryptocurrency to traditional equity markets.
content: Bitcoin continues to decline as stocks hit record highs, with investors also eyeing big IPOs.

title: Big Tech's AI ambitions pose a major power test for Europe
summary: SoftBank announced plans to build 3.1 GW of AI data centers in northern France by 2031. The project exemplifies Big Tech's massive power requirements as AI infrastructure development accelerates across Europe.

title: 'Without free meal, it's a cup of soup for dinner'

content: Community cafe in Boston says numbers rose from about 60 to more than 90 at the start of the year.

title: Investors bet humanoid robots will transform industry and homes over the next decade
summary: Fund managers see significant investment opportunities in humanoid robotics over the next decade. The sector is attracting capital amid expectations of transformative applications in industrial and residential settings.

title: Australia's first-quarter economic growth misses estimates on severe weather, weak demand
summary: Australia's first-quarter GDP grew 2.5% year-over-year, missing economist expectations of 2.6%. Severe weather and weak domestic demand weighed on economic performance.
content: The country's GDP expanded 2.5% in the first three months this year, compared to a year earlier, missing economists' expectations for a 2.6% growth.

title: Taking care of your family shouldn’t wreck your retirement
summary: Unpaid family caregiving costs Americans approximately $1,000 per month in lost income and retirement savings. Congress is considering legislation to help caregivers recover financially from their caregiving responsibilities.

summary: Susquehanna strategists recommend increasing portfolio hedges as summer approaches. The recommendation reflects anticipated market volatility or risk factors in the coming months.

title: Oil climbs as U.S.-Iran trade strikes while Trump says negotiations with Tehran underway
summary: Oil prices rise amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions, with U.S. Central Command reporting the successful interception of Iranian ballistic missiles. The situation is complicated by ongoing negotiations with Tehran, creating uncertainty about future military and economic implications.
content: U.S. Central Command said Tuesday that it had defeated multiple Iranian ballistic missiles following "attempted attacks" by Iran.

zh.title: 随着美国-伊朗贸易紧张局势升级，特朗普表示与德黑兰进行谈判，油价上升
zh.summary: 在美国-伊朗关系升级的背景下，油价上升。美国中央司令部报告成功拦截伊朗弹道导弹。与德黑兰的持续谈判使军事和经济前景面临不确定性。

title: Palo Alto Networks’ earnings show AI is a friend, not a foe, to revenue outlook
summary: Palo Alto Networks' strong earnings demonstrate that AI advancements are driving increased demand for cybersecurity solutions rather than disrupting revenue. The CEO noted that growing AI adoption is heightening the urgency around security needs.
content: The “latest advancements at the AI frontier have increased the level of urgency around cybersecurity,” Palo Alto Networks’ CEO said.

zh.title: Palo Alto Networks的财报显示人工智能对收入前景是朋友而非敌手
zh.summary: Palo Alto Networks强劲的财报表明，人工智能进步正在推动对网络安全解决方案的需求增加，而不是破坏收入。首席执行官指出，日益增长的人工智能采用正在提高安全需求的紧迫性。

title: GameStop wants to buy back $2 billion of its own stock after an eBay-fueled selloff
summary: GameStop announced a $2 billion stock buyback program following recent declines, even as the company reports strong first-quarter performance with a 14% sales increase driven by collectibles. The buyback signals management confidence in the stock's undervaluation.
content: The videogame retailer also said that collectibles helped drive a 14% sales gain in the first quarter.

zh.title: GameStop在eBay推动的抛售后，想要回购20亿美元的自身股票
zh.summary: GameStop宣布了一项20亿美元的股票回购计划，尽管公司报告第一季度业绩强劲，销售额增加14%，由收藏品驱动。回购表明管理层对股票被低估的信心。

title: Japan's Nikkei hits record high as Asia markets rise amid Middle East concerns
summary: Japan's Nikkei index reached record highs as broader Asia-Pacific markets rallied despite geopolitical tensions and concerns about oil prices from the closed Strait of Hormuz. The market strength suggests investor confidence is overcoming short-term regional concerns.
content: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher even amid concerns over volatile oil prices with the Strait of Hormuz remaining closed.

zh.title: 日本日经指数创历史新高，亚洲市场上扬，中东局势令人担忧
zh.summary: 日本日经指数创历史新高，尽管地缘政治紧张局势和霍尔木兹海峡关闭引发的石油价格担忧，亚太地区市场反弹。市场强劲表明投资者信心正在克服短期地区性关切。

title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including ‘Project 2025’ author
summary: Fed Chair Warsh has begun assembling his team at the central bank, including hiring an author who contributed to the conservative "Project 2025" policy blueprint. This signals potential shifts in Fed philosophy and policy direction under new leadership.
content: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."

zh.title: 美联储主席沃什在中央银行进行首次聘用，包括《2025计划》作者
zh.summary: 美联储主席沃什已开始在中央银行组建他的团队，包括聘用为保守派《2025计划》政策蓝图做出贡献的作者。这预示着新领导下美联储理念和政策方向可能出现转变。
